heading: Discontinuance of service on post roads
label: 5004 Discontinuance of service on post roads
text: The Postal Service may discontinue service on a post road or part thereof when, in its opinion, the public interest so requires.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , pursuant to Resolution No. 71–9 of the Board of Governors. See , set out as a note preceding .July 1, 1971section 15(a) of Pub. L. 91–375section 101 of this title
